actions.newGameConfirm: Start a new puzzle? Current progress will be lost.
actions.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset the puzzle? All progress will be lost.

hints.noHint: No hints available. Try using the undo button or clearing some cells.
hints.nakedSingle: This cell can only be {value}. All other numbers are already used in its row, column, or box.
hints.hiddenSingle: In this {unit}, the number {value} can only go in this cell.

archive.title: Puzzle Archive
archive.description: Browse and play all available Samurai Sudoku puzzles

metadata.title: Samurai Sudoku - Daily Puzzle Challenge
metadata.description: Play Samurai Sudoku online. Daily puzzles with offline support, hints, and progress tracking. Challenge yourself with 5 interconnected 9×9 grids.
metadata.keywords: sudoku, samurai sudoku, puzzle, brain game, logic game, daily puzzle, online sudoku, free sudoku

og.title: Samurai Sudoku - Daily Puzzle Challenge
og.description: Challenge yourself with daily Samurai Sudoku puzzles. Five 9×9 grids interconnected in perfect harmony.

home.description: Challenge yourself with the ultimate Sudoku puzzle. Five 9×9 grids interconnected in perfect harmony.
home.footer: © 2025 Samurai Sudoku. Daily puzzles for puzzle enthusiasts.

features.title: Features
features.offlineDesc: Play anytime, anywhere. Your progress is saved locally.
features.intelligentDesc: Get intelligent hints when you're stuck, with detailed explanations.
features.candidatesDesc: Visualize possible numbers with automatic candidate detection
features.progressDesc: Monitor your completion time, hints used, and improvement over time.
features.mobileDesc: Seamless gameplay on any device with touch-friendly controls
